column1: The first steam engines _____ to pump water out of mines. (use)
A bridge is a structure that _____ over a river. (build)
The bridge _____ at the end of the century. (build)
A new bridge _____ here in three years. (build)
Where is the brooch? Yesterday it _____ onto the jacket. (pin)
Geese _____ by farmers for their eggs, meat, and feathers. (keep)
A hospital is a place where sick people _____ . (treat)
Gold _____ in rocks and in the ground. (find)
The gold ring _____ under the bench last night. (find)
A museum is a place where interesting objects _____ . (display)
I hope it _____ at the next exhibition. (display)
It is easy to learn the list. The words _____ in the alphabetical order. (arrange)
